error_signature: OpenAI in n8n can’t read the PDF itself
title: OpenAI cannot process PDF files directly in n8n
symptom: When trying to use OpenAI to extract data from PDF invoices, n8n returns random output data instead of the expected invoice details.
not_this_if: PDF files are already processed or extracted
root_cause: The OpenAI Chat Model in n8n does not have the capability to read PDF files directly. It requires the text to be extracted from the PDF first, either through a PDF extraction node or an OCR process for scanned documents.
fix_steps: Add a 'Download file' node to retrieve the PDF invoice.
Insert a 'PDF Extract' node for native PDFs or use a 'Function' node with the 'pdf-parse' package.
For scanned PDFs, use 'Tesseract OCR' or an HTTP Request node to send the file to an OCR API.
Pass the extracted text to the OpenAI Chat Model with a properly formatted prompt.
agent_instruction: Extract text from the PDF before passing it to the OpenAI Chat Model.
